name: motherduck-skills
description: Opinionated AI agent skills for building applications with MotherDuck, the serverless DuckDB-powered data warehouse.

interface.shortDescription: Build apps, pipelines, Dives, and analytics on MotherDuck.
interface.longDescription: Opinionated skills that teach AI coding agents how to connect, query, model, load, share, and build production applications on MotherDuck -- the serverless, DuckDB-powered cloud data warehouse. Covers connection paths, DuckDB SQL, Dives, DuckLake, customer-facing analytics, dashboards, data pipelines, migrations, and more.
defaultPrompt: Connect to MotherDuck and show me what databases are available.
Explore my analytics database, then create a Dive showing weekly revenue trends.
Build customer-facing analytics for my SaaS product using MotherDuck.
